description: A large mural depicting a bustling scene of the Totonac civilization. In the foreground, numerous figures in elaborate indigenous costumes engage in trade, ceremony, and daily activities. Warriors carry ornate shields and weapons, while others display goods. Behind them rises a stepped pyramid and a sprawling city with various structures. The scene is richly colored with detailed costumes, headdresses, and ritual objects. A decorative frieze runs along the bottom.
